tasks.subject: INV Task 1: SDE invention tables + loader parse pass (Sonnet)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Three invention tables + testable _parse_invention_item + loader block over blueprints.jsonl.

```json:metadata
{"plan": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-10-invention-math.md", "planTask": 1, "model": "sonnet", "files": ["app/db/sde_models.py", "app/sde/loader.py", "tests/test_sde_invention_parse.py"], "verifyCommand": ".venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_sde_invention_parse.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["three models", "pure parse function", "batched loader block", "no-invention and no-products cases"]}
```

tasks.subject: INV Task 2: pure invention math module (Opus)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Probability/attempt-cost/invented-BPC/overhead functions + verified DECRYPTORS table; DCII reference test.

```json:metadata
{"plan": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-10-invention-math.md", "planTask": 2, "model": "opus", "files": ["app/industry/invention.py", "tests/test_invention_math.py"], "verifyCommand": ".venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_invention_math.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["formula with clamps", "DCII all-IV reference 0.4647", "unpriced datacore None", "decryptor attrs verified against SDE with cited query"]}
```

tasks.subject: INV Task 3: inventability lookup + skill resolution (Sonnet)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** sde.get_invention_data bulk lookup; characters endpoint; _resolve_invention_skills with missing-skill flag.

```json:metadata
{"plan": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-10-invention-math.md", "planTask": 3, "model": "sonnet", "files": ["app/sde/lookup.py", "app/routes/industry.py", "tests/test_invention_lookup.py"], "verifyCommand": ".venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_invention_lookup.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["bulk chain product->T2bp->invention", "characters endpoint skills-scope filtered", "missing science -> level 0 + flag"]}
```

tasks.subject: INV Task 4: Build Finder integration + UI (Sonnet)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** rank_builds accepts invention dict (invented ME override + overhead); route params + chips + dropdown + footnote; pre-reimport graceful.

```json:metadata
{"plan": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-10-invention-math.md", "planTask": 4, "model": "sonnet", "files": ["app/industry/build_finder.py", "app/routes/industry.py", "app/templates/build_finder.html", "app/templates/partials/build_finder_results.html", "tests/test_build_finder.py"], "verifyCommand": ".venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/ -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["invented ME override", "None overhead excludes row", "non-inventable rows unchanged", "pre-reimport graceful"]}
```
